description: Resumable tracker for the docs-site finalization: GitHub Pages @ fileshub-docs.zaions.com, full API docs (emails/jobs/schedules/templates/version + key restrictions), raw-markdown mirror + manifest, OpenAPI 3.1 core, Firebase removal. static/openapi.json (OpenAPI 3.1 core, X-API-Key scheme, restriction headers as optional params) + redocly lint 0 errors + docs/api/openapi.md
